name: [BUG-OT-001] TC-OT-009 — GET /api/v1/token: No Authorization header must return 401 (returns 504)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-OT-001]**

**What this test does:**
Calls GET /api/v1/token without any Authorization header and verifies the server rejects the request with 401 Unauthorized.

**Expected:** HTTP 401 Unauthorized (fail-fast at the gateway)
**Actual:** HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout

**Root Cause:** The APISIX gateway does not enforce authentication on this route. The unauthenticated request is forwarded to the upstream oauth-token service, which then attempts to contact the KCB authorization server but times out.

**Impact:** Every unauthenticated call ties up an upstream connection and waits for the full gateway timeout period (60+ seconds), wasting resources and potentially masking the real error from the caller.
descriptionHtml:
[KNOWN BUG — BUG-OT-001]

What this test does:
Calls GET /api/v1/token without any Authorization header and verifies the server rejects the request with 401 Unauthorized.

Expected: HTTP 401 Unauthorized (fail-fast at the gateway)
Actual: HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout

Root Cause: The APISIX gateway does not enforce authentication on this route. The unauthenticated request is forwarded to the upstream oauth-token service, which then attempts to contact the KCB authorization server but times out.

Impact: Every unauthenticated call ties up an upstream connection and waits for the full gateway timeout period (60+ seconds), wasting resources and potentially masking the real error from the caller.
